column1: Gujarat Gas Limited (GGL) is a government company u/s 2(45) of Companies Act 2013. Formerly Known as GSPC Distribution Networks Limited(GDNL), GGL is engaged in the business of Natural gas in India. The business of natural gas involves distribution of gas from sources of supply to centres of demand and to end customers. [1] GGL caters to its customers by providing CNG and PNG connections in domestic, Industrial,  Commercial and Non commercial segments in the areas of South & Central Gujarat and Saurashtra. [2]
